description: Simulate a critical clinical event (Hypoxic Tachycardia) using a simulated Multiparameter Monitor and capture the data for validation. Record a baseline state for at least 10 seconds with Heart Rate between 60-80 BPM and SpO2 between 96-100%. Then, induce and record a distress state (Hypoxic Tachycardia) for at least 10 seconds with Heart Rate above 120 BPM and SpO2 below 90%. Export the resulting data file to /home/ga/Desktop/hypoxia_test_data.csv.
